content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Thorough review of sync/import safety rules implementation. All acceptance criteria are met: sync --import-only support with dirty-state guard, sync_if_dirty() convenience methods, JSONL health check (conflict markers, malformed records, missing files, br unavailability), pre-operation safety checks at every bead mutation site (create, close, dep add, sync), comprehensive test coverage including recovery paths and cross-process locking. The code is well-structured with proper error handling, crash recovery via persisted pending-mutation journals, and defensive health checks. No bugs, safety issues, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
